rawAssistant:
I am Varo, Storm Tyrant, commander of the Skyglass Spire. You seek to know the secrets behind my judgment? Let me tell you, it is not the weight of knowledge that I possess, but the fire in my heart that drives me to test those who dare challenge the relic storm's power.

The forces that shape my mind are not to be found in dusty tomes or ancient scrolls. They are forged in the very heart of the tempests I command. My strength is not in my words, but in the fury of the skies themselves. Those who seek to master the storm must first prove their worth against its unyielding power.

Do you think you possess the mettle to face what lies within?
